business.headline: US proposes H1B minimum wage hike, likely to make hiring foreign workers costlierThe US Department of Labour has proposed sharply higher prevailing wages for H-1B and related visa programmes. The draft rule has drawn both support and opposition ahead of the May 26 comment deadline.

Can motor insurers reject claims for reporting accidents late?Handcrafted ByOur Editors In the fifth story in our series Motor Mess, we spoke to experts to understand why delayed accident reporting often leads to insurance claim rejections, the mistakes policyholders should avoid and what options remain if such claims are rejected.

Two inspections, one pattern: Labour off the booksIn the sixth part of this series on labour laws and Inspector Raj, multiple factory inspections conducted in 1988 expose recurring patterns of undocumented labour, hidden wage records and statutory evasion.

Petrol and diesel prices likely to be hiked before May 15Petrol and diesel prices in India are likely to be hiked before May 15 as state-run oil marketing companies face rising financial stress amid a sharp surge in global crude oil prices, sources told India Today TV.

Bringing mothers in as co-applicants: Redefining home loan ownership in IndiaFamilies are now increasingly choosing to involve mothers in building long-term financial assets and securing a stronger financial future for themselves.

From flowers to financial freedom: Rethinking Mother's DayFor years, Mother's Day has been about flowers and celebrations. But slowly, conversations are shifting towards something deeper, i.e., helping mothers build savings, investments, and financial confidence of their own.

Explained: Why SBI shares tumbled nearly 7% after Q4 resultsSBI shares fell sharply after the lender's Q4 earnings disappointed the market. The reaction underscored investor concern over treasury income, margins and earnings quality.

Sensex closes over 500 points lower as SBI tumbles nearly 7% after Q4 resultsBenchmark indices closed sharply lower on Thursday after SBI's weaker-than-expected Q4 results hit banking shares. The decline reflected caution around crude oil prices, West Asia tensions and the broader earnings season.

Sensex sinks 600 points: Why is the stock market falling today?Benchmark indices fell sharply on Thursday as higher crude prices, foreign selling and weak banking stocks hit sentiment. Investors stayed cautious ahead of key Q4 results, with traders watching US-Iran tensions and oil moves.

I broke my FD 3 times: When it helped and when it hurtA fixed deposit feels safe because it is supposed to sit quietly in the background, growing slowly over time. But when life throws sudden surprises, that safety net often becomes the first thing people reach for. The real question is, when does breaking an FD actually make sense, and when does it backfire?

Think PAN is needed only for ITR Filing? 7 transactions where you must quote itPAN has quietly become one of the most important financial documents in India today, but are you aware that many banking, investment and cash transactions cannot be completed without quoting it?

8th Pay Commission: The family unit formula behind salary revisions of govt employeesEmployee unions have urged the 8th Pay Commission to revisit the family unit formula used to fix salaries. Any revision could raise basic pay, allowances, pensions and the broader compensation bill. But what exactly is the 'family unit' formula?

Tata Trusts board meeting postponed amid Tata Sons governance, listing discussionsTata Trusts has postponed a crucial board meeting scheduled for today to May 16, as governance disputes, Tata Sons board representation, listing discussions and leadership questions continue to draw attention across corporate India.

Lenskart shares fall over 2% amid block deal buzz, IPO lock-in expiryLenskart shares fell in Thursday's trade as block deal chatter coincided with the expiry of its IPO lock-in period. The move put the spotlight on possible supply pressure even as analysts said fundamentals remain unchanged.

Sensex opens 400 points lower, Nifty slips below 24,200 as banking stocks dragThe BSE Sensex fell 422.11 points, or 0.54%, to 77,422.41 in early trade. The NSE Nifty50 slipped 129 points to 24,197.65, falling below the 24,200 mark.

Why is Maharashtra's Rs 100 Will registration move getting so much attention?Anyone who owns assets such as a flat, land, jewellery, fixed deposits, shares or mutual funds should consider making a Will. Even small savings can become the reason for family disagreements if there is no clear-written instruction from the owner.

Pronto bags fresh $20 million funding, valuation jumps to $200 millionPronto offers quick home services such as laundry, kitchen preparation and home cleaning, with services starting from Rs 125. Workers are available within 15 minutes through the platform.

Stock market ends flat as Sensex slips 114, Nifty stays above 24,300Benchmark equity indices ended little changed on Wednesday, with the Sensex slipping 114 points and the Nifty holding above 24,300. The muted session underlined investor caution over global cues, interest rate expectations and earnings momentum, while selective buying capped losses.

Can senior citizens above skip ITR filing in FY27? Here's who qualifiesFiling income tax returns every year can be stressful for many elderly taxpayers. But did you know some senior citizens above 75 may not need to file ITR in FY27 at all if certain conditions are met?

Bought a car above Rs 10 lakh? You may be missing this tax creditCar buyers paying over Rs 10 lakh are being reminded to check the 1% TCS collected at purchase. The credit, linked to PAN records, can reduce tax dues or increase refunds at ITR filing.

entertainment.headline: Kiara Advani recalls emotional phase after childbirth and how Sidharth stood by her Kiara Advani has spoken about the emotional shifts she experienced after childbirth and the support Sidharth Malhotra gave her. Rashmika Mandanna posts unseen moments from Vijay Deverakonda's birthday Rashmika Mandanna posted an Instagram birthday note for Vijay Deverakonda on May 9, with videos and pictures from the day. The post put together moments with family, friends, fans and their time at home.

Sonam Kapoor-Anand Ahuja reveal second son's name, share its meaning Sonam Kapoor and Anand Ahuja have introduced their second son on Instagram. Revealing the name, the actor said it shares a sacred Vedic connection with his elder brother Vayu.

Drishyam 3 trailer: Mystery deepens for Mohanlal in new chapter of film series The official trailer of Drishyam 3 is out, offering a fresh glimpse into the next chapter of Mohanlal's adventure as Georgekutty. It keeps major twists hidden while building suspense around the next chapter of the family saga.

Patriarchy still deeply ingrained: Kriti Sanon calls out pay disparity in industry Kriti Sanon said female leads are often asked to accept lower fees in Bollywood. She said the pattern shows how deeply industry bias and patriarchy still persist.

Avika Gor relocates to Bangkok with husband Milind Chandwani. Here's why Avika Gor has moved to Bangkok with Milind Chandwani after their marriage. In an interview, the actor opened up about the decision. She will be seen next in Khatron Ke Khiladi 15.

Tanishaa Mukerji: Intense prep for Neal 'n' Nikki look led to hormonal imbalance Tanishaa Mukerji said Aditya Chopra asked her to get toned for Neal 'n' Nikki, leading her into an intense transformation. She said the regimen caused hormonal imbalance.

Ranveer Singh clicks selfies with fans on King set in South Africa, pics go viral Ranveer Singh was seen meeting fans in South Africa while Deepika Padukone filmed King with SRK. The sightings drew attention days after a video showed him with daughter Dua on set.

Vijay Deverakonda stuns in Rowdy Janardhana poster as Keerthy Suresh takes charge The makers of Rowdy Janardhana unveiled a birthday poster showing Vijay Deverakonda and Keerthy Suresh in a striking face-off. The poster teases the film's mix of rural action and romance ahead of its December 2026 release.

Nora Fatehi to perform at FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony in Canada Nora Fatehi is set to perform at the FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony in Canada on June 12. The announcement marks her return to the FIFA stage as the tournament opens across three host countries.

Vijay Deverakonda waves at fans, greets them with Rashmika on 37th birthday Fans gathered outside actor Vijay Deverakonda's home for his birthday celebrations on Saturday. The actor waved at the crowd, cut a cake and was joined by his wife, actor Rashmika Mandanna.

Main Vaapas Aaunga: Sharvari's note for Imtiaz Ali hints at their bond on set Actor Sharvari shared behind-the-scenes moments of the song Maskara from her upcoming film Main Ghar Aaunga. She also posted an emotional note for director Imtiaz Ali, thanking him for helping her discover new shades in her performance.

Will Diljit Dosanjh become Punjab's political face? Singer sets record straight Actor-singer Diljit Dosanjh reacted to calls asking him to enter Punjab politics. In an X post, he made it clear that he wants to stay focused on entertainment.

Will The Devil Wears Prada get part 3? Director David Frankel reacts to buzz Director David Frankel said he would be open to returning for a third The Devil Wears Prada film. The cast, including Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway, earlier shared what would be needed for part three to happen.

This is not us: Karan-Tejasswi fight it out in flashy outfits in Desi Bling promo The new promo of Desi Bling shows a tense moment between actors Karan Kundrra and Tejasswi Prakash after she tells him he gets influenced by people around him. The clip ends with emotional scenes, tears and a conversation about their relationship.

Stop PR games: Ameesha Patel questions actors 'buying' superstar status Actor Ameesha Patel slammed Bollywood's PR games and said actors should call themselves a superstar only after creating history and havoc at the box office. She also said her PR machinery is weak, unlike others, while talking about her blockbuster films.

Win for Tamil Nadu: Genelia D'Souza calls Vijay's election victory proud moment Actor Genelia D'Souza said Thalapathy Vijay's election victory is a proud moment for Tamil Nadu. She said the result reflected public trust in him and faith that he would meet expectations.

Is Yash's global dream proving toxic to his pan-India superstardom? What began as anticipation has turned into a test of patience for fans. Yash's upcoming mega project Toxic promises to shape the actor's global ambition. But, given the multiple delays, is he getting too obsessed about delivering the perfect global product with Toxic?

Jackie Shroff's The Great Grand Superhero gets a release date: What to expect Jackie Shroff-starrer The Great Grand Superhero finally has a release date. The fantasy drama explores childhood imagination, aliens and the bond between a grandfather and his grandson.

Fourth time's the charm as Vijay gets Governor's nod, swearing-in todayAfter days of political uncertainty and alliance negotiations, Vijay secured support from 120 MLAs to stake claim in Tamil Nadu, paving the way for his swearing-in as Chief Minister on Sunday.

Delhi on alert as intel warns of terror attack weeks after Pak module bustSecurity has been tightened across Delhi after intelligence agencies warned of possible IED attacks at key locations, with police intensifying checks amid recent terror module busts linked to Pakistan-based handlers.

Over 80,000 fail Marathi first language paper in Maharashtra Class 10, sparks concernMore than 80,000 students failed the Marathi first language paper in the Maharashtra SSC examinations this year. The figures have sharpened concerns over how regional languages are being taught and used.

Live: Governor asks Vijay to prove majority in Tamil Nadu Assembly by May 13Tamil Nadu Government Formation News Live Updates: The uncertainty over government formation in Tamil Nadu has come to an end after the VCK extended unconditional support to the TVK. Moreover, the IUML also extended its support to the Vijay-led party. Earlier in the day, AMMK leader TTV Dhinakaran challenged TVK's claim of securing his party's support, demanding the original letter allegedly submitted to the Governor. He said AMMK MLA S Kamraj denied authorising such support and accused TVK of relying on a photocopied document, with a police complaint already filed. Kamraj further dismissed a video released by Vijay-led TVK as AI-generated. Meanwhile, a TVK supporter allegedly attempted self-immolation demanding Vijay become Chief Minister, prompting BJP leader Tamilisai Soundararajan to urge Vijay to calm supporters. Simultaneously, AIADMK MLAs met Edappadi K Palaniswami in Chennai, while Congress legislators remained camped in Hyderabad amid continuing political uncertainty. Stay tuned to IndiaToday.in for the latest updates.

TMC names 10-time MLA Sobhandeb Chattopadhyay Leader of Opposition in BengalThe Trinamool Congress has named Sobhandeb Chattopadhyay as Leader of Opposition in the 18th West Bengal Assembly. The move follows the party's defeat, Mamata Banerjee's loss in Bhabanipur and a wider reshuffle of opposition roles.

Limbs on runway: US plane hits man during takeoff, chilling cockpit audio emergesA Frontier Airlines flight in Denver struck a trespasser on the runway during take-off, causing an engine fire and evacuation. The incident left passengers injured and prompted federal investigations.

Is it a UFO? Newly released video raises questions of alien originsThe US government has released a declassified video of a star-shaped object filmed over the Middle East in 2013, and it remains officially unexplained.

How VCK with just 2 MLAs strung Vijay along for 3 daysFor three days, Vijay's march to Fort St George was repeatedly stalled not by a rival heavyweight, but by a two-MLA party that kept Tamil Nadu politics on edge.

US-Iran War Live: Israeli strikes kill four in southern LebanonUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: The Gulf crisis deepened as President Donald Trump warned of renewed military action if Iran refuses to reopen the strait, even as regional powers continue diplomatic efforts to prevent a wider Middle East escalation. Meanwhile, a Qatari LNG tanker headed towards the Strait of Hormuz, potentially becoming the first such vessel to cross since the Iran war began. Tensions remained high despite a fragile ceasefire, with the US striking Iranian-linked tankers and warning Tehran against blocking global shipping routes. Bahrain arrested 41 people over alleged Iran links, while Britain and France accelerated plans for a multinational maritime coalition to secure Hormuz. Stay with IndiaToday.in for the latest and live updates-

sports.headline: Is IPL hurting Jacob Bethell's career? RCB batter reacts to Cook-Pietersen debate IPL 2026, RCB vs MI: Jacob Bethell backed his decision to stay with Royal Challengers Bengaluru despite limited opportunities, insisting the IPL environment and exposure to world-class players will only help his development.

Aryna Sabalenka injured before French Open? World No.1 reveals fitness scare Aryna Sabalenka revealed that a lower back and hip issue hampered her movement during her shock Italian Open defeat to Sorana Cirstea, forcing her to take a medical timeout in the deciding set.

Don't play one off Test with anyone!: Veteran SL cricketer slams likely ECB plan Angelo Mathews has hit out at reports that England want one-Test tours of Sri Lanka and Bangladesh in the next WTC cycle. His response sharpens the wider argument over equality, revenue and the future shape of Test cricket.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi keeps haunting bowlers, becomes fastest to 100 T20 sixes Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continued his stunning rise in T20 cricket, becoming the fastest batter to reach 100 sixes by getting there in just 514 balls during Rajasthan Royals' clash against Gujarat Titans in IPL 2026.

Gujarat Titans strengthen playoff grip as Rajasthan Royals sink further IPL 2026, RR vs GT: Gujarat Titans stormed into the top two after beating the Rajasthan Royals by 77 runs on Saturday at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur. With the defeat, the Royals also slipped out of the top four.

CSK requests fans to avoid political signage in IPL match vs LSG Chennai Super Kings have urged fans to avoid bringing political banners, flags and hoardings to Chepauk ahead of their IPL 2026 clash against Lucknow Super Giants. The advisory comes amid renewed political focus around the stadium following Vijay becoming Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister.

Sabalenka suffers another upset as World No.1 struggles before French Open Italian Open 2026: World No.1 Aryna Sabalenka suffered another major upset before the French Open, losing to Sorana Cirstea in Rome after her earlier shock defeat to Hailey Baptiste in Madrid.

11 deliveries. 17 runs. Biggest no-ball: Archer's over from hell in RR vs GT Rajasthan Royals' Jofra Archer delivered perhaps his worst over in Indian Premier League this season. Playing against GT, Archer bowled 11 deliveries, conceded 17 runs in the first over of the match.

Will Hardik and Surya play must-win game against RCB? MI provides update IPL 2026: Mumbai Indians face a must-win situation against Royal Challengers Bengaluru, needing victory in all remaining games to stay in playoff contention. With only four matches left, their qualification hopes depend not just on winning, but also on favourable results elsewhere on the points table.

Yashasvi Jaiswal makes captaincy debut vs GT, but why did Riyan Parag miss out?IPL 2026, GT vs RR: Yashasvi Jaiswal led the Rajasthan Royals in the clash against Gujarat Royals on Saturday at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur as Riyan Parag missed out due to a hamstring injury.

Arshdeep Singh's instagram reels under scanner amid BCCI-guidelinesIPL 2026: The BCCI has issued a fresh IPL advisory that puts player-generated social media content and team access under tighter control. The move reflects the board's concern that loose franchise protocols could undermine security and anti-corruption safeguards.

They have betrayed Real Madrid: Coach Arbeloa slams dressing room leaksReal Madrid manager Alvaro Arbeloa considers the dressing room leaks as a betrayal of the club's badge. The manager reacted to the ugly brawl inside the Real Madrid dressing room ahead of the final El Clasico this season.

Mohammad Abbas, Azan Awais lead Pakistan's fightback in Mirpur TestBAN vs PAK, 1st Test: Mohammad Abbas starred with a five-wicket haul before debutant Azan Awais struck an unbeaten 85 as Pakistan mounted a spirited fightback on Day 2 of the opening Test against Bangladesh in Mirpur.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi named RR's new rockstar as Ravindra Jadeja passes mantleRavindra Jadeja has handed Vaibhav Suryavanshi the 'Rockstar' tag once made famous by Shane Warne, praising the Rajasthan Royals youngster's maturity, composure and fearless batting.

RR vs GT Highlights: Rashid Khan-led GT dethrones RR from top-fourRR (Rajasthan) vs GT (Gujarat) Highlights, IPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals (151 in 16.3 ovs) chasing 230. Rashid Khan starred with a match-winning spell as Gujarat Titans defeated Rajasthan Royals by 77 runs to move into the top four of the points table. Chasing a massive 230, RR struggled throughout the innings, with Rashid dismantling the middle order in a dominant all-round GT performance.

Sri Lanka Cricket drops social media rule for Lanka Premier League after backlashSri Lanka Cricket has removed the 250,000-follower threshold for Lanka Premier League Icon and Star players after criticism. The retreat fixes one embarrassment, but the tournament still leans heavily on social media promotion.

Stubbs is overrated: Ex-IND selector tears into DC star as poor run continuesKris Srikkanth tore into the Delhi Capitals after their batting crumbled against KKR, singling out Tristan Stubbs. Srikkanth said that the Delhi middle-order is finished after they slipped to a loss to KKR.

Chess GM Abhijeet Gupta exposes Odisha chess tournament for unpaid prize moneyAbhijeet Gupta has accused the Odisha Open organisers of withholding his prize money despite repeated assurances. Abhijeet approached the sports ministry to get involved in the matter to resolve the issue.

Fan's phone turns off after Rohit Sharma agrees to selfie, what's next is hilariousRohit Sharma found himself in an awkward fan interaction before Mumbai Indians' match, but the veteran batter's focus will remain on carrying his strong comeback form into the crucial stage of the season.

Wrestling Federation bars Vinesh Phogat from competing in comeback tournamentThe Wrestling Federation of India has barred Vinesh Phogat from the National Open Ranking Tournament in Gonda. The decision halts her planned return after reversing her post-Paris Olympics retirement.

Asian Beach Games | Shifting sands of Sanya: Where grit is all you haveAt the Asian Beach Games in Sanya, the sand turned every event into a contest of endurance, skill and nerve. The medals mattered, but the deeper story was how athletes from India and across Asia met hardship head-on.

Stuttering Rajasthan Royals take on resurgent Gujarat Titans in Jaipur encounterRR vs GT: Rajasthan and Gujarat meet in Jaipur with play-off places up for grabs. Two contrasting teams, one critical match. Who blinks first in the top-four race?

Not the next IPL: India Basketball League wants its own court, own cultureIndia's first professional basketball league is not trying to become the next IPL, and that may be its smartest move. The IBL wants to build a sustainable ecosystem, giving young players a genuine career pathway instead of chasing cricket's blueprint.

Chahal should be behind bars: Ex-spinner on PBKS star after alleged vaping rowLaxman Sivaramakrishnan has demanded action after a viral clip allegedly showed Yuzvendra Chahal vaping on a Punjab Kings flight. The former spinner said that Chahal should be behind bars for his actions.

Spinning a web: How KKR spinners have bounced back to reignite team's fading hopesIPL 2026, DC vs KKR: Kolkata Knight Riders beat the Delhi Capitals by eight wickets after their spin trio of Sunil Narine, Varun Chakravarthy and Anukul Roy put their best foot forward at the Arun Jaitley Stadium.

Yashasvi Jaiswal, Shafali Verma served notice for missing dope tests: SourcesYashasvi Jaiswal and Shafali Verma have received their first missed test notices from NADA after they were unavailable for scheduled dope tests. The cases fall under the whereabouts failure rule, where three lapses in 12 months can lead to a ban of up to two years.

F1 bows to Verstappen, drivers criticism, agrees to massive 2027 engine shake-upFormula 1 and the teams have agreed in principle to alter the 2027 engine rules after drivers objected to excessive battery dependence. The move comes after the governing body decided to heed the demands from the drivers after criticism early on.

Djokovic reveals worrying fitness truth after shock first-round exit in RomeNovak Djokovic has admitted recurring physical issues are now part of his reality after a shock Italian Open exit, raising fresh concerns over his fitness ahead of the French Open.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
